    <style>
        * { box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif; touch-action: manipulation; }
        body { 
            background: #0a0e17; color: white; margin: 0; padding: 15px; 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 100vh;
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top, #002b5c 0%, #0a0e17 70%);
            padding-bottom: 80px; 
        }

        /* === الهيدر === */
        .compact-header {
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
            background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.9); padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 50px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); margin-bottom: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .room-pill {
            background: rgba(0, 198, 255, 0.1); padding: 6px 15px; border-radius: 30px;
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer;
            transition: 0.3s; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 198, 255, 0.3);
        }
        .room-code { color: #ffd700; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; letter-spacing: 1px; }

        .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; }
        .btn-icon { 
            width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; border: none; color: #fff; 
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        .btn-info { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
        .btn-end { background: rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.2); color: #e74c3c; border: 1px solid #e74c3c; }

        /* === شريط التحكم === */
        .controls-bar { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; justify-content: center; }
        .size-select {
            background: #1e2a38; color: white; border: 1px solid #00c6ff;
            padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Tajawal'; font-weight: bold;
            outline: none; cursor: pointer; flex: 1; max-width: 200px;
        }
        .btn-restart {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00c6ff, #0072ff); color: white;
            border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: bold; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
        }

        /* === الشبكة === */
        .grid-container { 
            display: grid; gap: 10px; padding: 15px; 
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border-radius: 20px; 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); 
            margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; /* زيادة العرض قليلاً للـ 5 أعمدة */
        }
        .cols-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
        .cols-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
        .cols-5 { grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); } /* تمت إضافته */

        .cell-card { 
            aspect-ratio: 1/1; 
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2c3e50, #1a252f); 
            border-radius: 15px; 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; 
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); 
            position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: 0.2s;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .cell-card:active { transform: scale(0.95); }
        .cell-number { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); z-index: 1; font-size: 1.2rem; }
        
        .cell-card.revealed { background: #000; border-color: #444; pointer-events: none; }
        .cell-card.revealed .cell-number { opacity: 0; }
        
        .cell-image { 
            width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; position: absolute; 
            top: 0; left: 0; display: none; z-index: 2; border-radius: 13px; 
        }
        .cell-card.revealed .cell-image { display: block; animation: popIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275); }
        @keyframes popIn { from { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

        /* === شريط الإحصائيات === */
        .stats-bar {
            margin-top: 20px;
            background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6); 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            padding: 15px; 
            border-radius: 20px;
            display: flex; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;
            width: 100%; max-width: 500px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;
        }
        .stat-item {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; 
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 12px;
            min-width: 70px;
        }
        .stat-count { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
        .stat-label { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; }

        /* === تخصيص SweetAlert === */
        div:where(.swal2-container) div:where(.swal2-popup) {
            background: #1e2a38 !important;
            border: 2px solid #ffd700 !important;
            color: #fff !important;
            border-radius: 25px !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important;
        }
        
        .reveal-modal-content {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
            padding: 20px; border-radius: 20px;
        }
        .reveal-img { 
            width: 140px; height: 140px; object-fit: contain; margin-bottom: 15px; 
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)); 
            animation: bounceIn 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
        }
        .reveal-title { font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: 900; margin: 10px 0; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
        .reveal-desc { font-size: 1.2rem; color: #ddd; }

        @keyframes bounceIn { 0% { transform: scale(0); } 80% { transform: scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }

        .swal-transparent-popup { background: transparent !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="">

    <div class="compact-header">
        <div class="room-pill" onclick="copyLink()">
            <span class="room-code" id="roomCodeDisplay">3494</span>
            <i class="fa-regular fa-copy" style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #00c6ff;"></i>
        </div>

        <div class="header-actions">
            <button class="btn-icon btn-info" onclick="showInstructions()"><i class="fa-solid fa-question"></i></button>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-end" onclick="endGame()"><i class="fa-solid fa-power-off"></i></button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="controls-bar">
        <select id="sizeSelect" class="size-select" onchange="startGame()">
            <option value="9">صغيرة (9)</option>
            <option value="16" selected="">كبيرة (16)</option>
            <option value="20">عملاقة (20)</option>
        </select>
        <button class="btn-restart" onclick="confirmRestart()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-right"></i> توزيع جديد
        </button>
    </div>

    <div class="grid-container cols-4" id="grid"><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">1</span>
                    <img src="images/skull.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">2</span>
                    <img src="images/key.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">3</span>
                    <img src="images/uniform.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">4</span>
                    <img src="images/open.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">5</span>
                    <img src="images/open.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">6</span>
                    <img src="images/uniform.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">7</span>
                    <img src="images/key.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">8</span>
                    <img src="images/key.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">9</span>
                    <img src="images/open.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">10</span>
                    <img src="images/open.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">11</span>
                    <img src="images/skip.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">12</span>
                    <img src="images/open.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">13</span>
                    <img src="images/skip.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">14</span>
                    <img src="images/uniform.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">15</span>
                    <img src="images/skull.png" class="cell-image">
                </div><div class="cell-card ">
                    <span class="cell-number">16</span>
                    <img src="images/uniform.png" class="cell-image">
                </div></div>

    <div class="stats-bar" id="statsBar">
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">2</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: #c0392b">إعدام</div>
                    </div>
                
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">5</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: #00c6ff">زنزانة فارغة</div>
                    </div>
                
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">4</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: #e74c3c">ملابس</div>
                    </div>
                
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">3</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: #f1c40f">مفتاح</div>
                    </div>
                
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">2</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: #95a5a6">ممتلئة</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

    <script type="module">
        import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-app.js";
        import { getFirestore, doc, onSnapshot, setDoc, updateDoc, deleteDoc, getDoc } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-firestore.js";

        const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: "AIzaSyDmP7LF_Rh_jvJy9vdsWVpHN9mmYzrgbxk", authDomain: "qgames-43e70.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "qgames-43e70", storageBucket: "qgames-43e70.firebasestorage.app", messagingSenderId: "855663167560", appId: "1:855663167560:web:c710e774d09ba7c7a4707d" };
        const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
        const db = getFirestore(app);

        let roomId = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('room');
        if (!roomId) {
            roomId = Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000).toString();
            window.history.replaceState(null, null, `?room=${roomId}`);
        }
        
        const roomRef = doc(db, "active_rooms", roomId);
        document.getElementById('roomCodeDisplay').innerText = roomId;

        let gameState = null;

        // إعدادات اللعبة (تعديل 20 ليكون 5 أعمدة)
        const GAME_CONFIGS = {
            9:  { cols: 3, types: { open: 3, uniform: 2, skull: 1, key: 2, skip: 1 } },
            16: { cols: 4, types: { open: 5, uniform: 4, skull: 2, key: 3, skip: 2 } },
            20: { cols: 5, types: { open: 6, uniform: 5, skull: 3, key: 3, skip: 3 } } // تم التعديل إلى 5 أعمدة
        };

        const ITEMS_DATA = {
            'open': { title: 'زنزانة فارغة', desc: '🔓 تم حبس لاعب من الخصم!', img: 'images/open.png', color: '#00c6ff', label: 'زنزانة فارغة' },
            'uniform': { title: 'ملابس السجن', desc: '🚫 ارتدي الملابس!', img: 'images/uniform.png', color: '#e74c3c', label: 'ملابس' },
            'skull': { title: 'إعــــدام', desc: '💀 خروج نهائي!', img: 'images/skull.png', color: '#c0392b', label: 'إعدام' },
            'key': { title: 'مفتـــاح', desc: '🔑 حرر سجين.', img: 'images/key.png', color: '#f1c40f', label: 'مفتاح' },
            'skip': { title: 'زنزانة ممتلئة', desc: '✋ تخطي الدور.', img: 'images/skip.png', color: '#95a5a6', label: 'ممتلئة' }
        };

        async function init() {
            const snap = await getDoc(roomRef);
            if (!snap.exists()) {
                await startGame(); 
            }
            onSnapshot(roomRef, (docSnap) => {
                if(!docSnap.exists()) return;
                const data = docSnap.data();
                gameState = data.gameState;
                
                const currentSize = gameState.grid.length;
                if([9, 16, 20].includes(currentSize)) {
                    document.getElementById('sizeSelect').value = currentSize;
                }
                
                renderGrid(gameState.grid, gameState.cols);
                updateStats(gameState.grid); 
            });
        }
        init();

        window.confirmRestart = () => {
            Swal.fire({
                title: 'إعادة توزيع؟',
                text: "سيتم تغيير أماكن العناصر!",
                icon: 'warning',
                showCancelButton: true,
                confirmButtonText: 'نعم، وزع',
                cancelButtonText: 'إلغاء',
                background: '#1e2a38', color: '#fff',
                confirmButtonColor: '#00c6ff', cancelButtonColor: '#e74c3c'
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) startGame();
            });
        };

        window.startGame = async () => {
            const size = parseInt(document.getElementById('sizeSelect').value);
            const config = GAME_CONFIGS[size];
            
            let deck = [];
            for (const [type, count] of Object.entries(config.types)) {
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    deck.push({ type: type, id: Math.random().toString(36), status: 'hidden' });
                }
            }
            deck.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);

            await setDoc(roomRef, {
                gameType: 'the_cell',
                createdAt: Date.now(),
                gameState: { grid: deck, cols: config.cols, modal: null }
            });
            
            const Toast = Swal.mixin({toast: true, position: 'top', showConfirmButton: false, timer: 1500, background: '#1e2a38', color:'#fff'});
            Toast.fire({ icon: 'success', title: 'تم التجهيز' });
        };

        function renderGrid(gridData, cols) {
            const gridContainer = document.getElementById('grid');
            gridContainer.className = `grid-container cols-${cols}`;
            gridContainer.innerHTML = '';

            gridData.forEach((cell, index) => {
                const el = document.createElement('div');
                const isRevealed = cell.status === 'revealed';
                const itemInfo = ITEMS_DATA[cell.type];

                el.className = `cell-card ${isRevealed ? 'revealed' : ''}`;
                el.innerHTML = `
                    <span class="cell-number">${index + 1}</span>
                    <img src="${itemInfo.img}" class="cell-image">
                `;
                el.onclick = () => revealCell(index, cell.type);
                gridContainer.appendChild(el);
            });
        }

        function updateStats(gridData) {
            const counts = { 'open': 0, 'uniform': 0, 'skull': 0, 'key': 0, 'skip': 0 };
            gridData.forEach(cell => { if(cell.status === 'hidden') counts[cell.type]++; });

            const statsBar = document.getElementById('statsBar');
            statsBar.innerHTML = '';
            const order = ['skull', 'open', 'uniform', 'key', 'skip'];
            
            order.forEach(type => {
                const info = ITEMS_DATA[type];
                const count = counts[type];
                statsBar.innerHTML += `
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">${count}</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: ${info.color}">${info.label}</div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });
        }

        async function revealCell(index, type) {
            const newGrid = [...gameState.grid];
            if (newGrid[index].status === 'revealed') return;

            newGrid[index].status = 'revealed';
            const itemData = ITEMS_DATA[type];

            Swal.fire({
                html: `
                    <div class="reveal-modal-content">
                        <img src="${itemData.img}" class="reveal-img">
                        <div class="reveal-title" style="color:${itemData.color}">${itemData.title}</div>
                        <div class="reveal-desc">${itemData.desc}</div>
                    </div>
                `,
                showConfirmButton: true,
                confirmButtonText: 'متابعة',
                confirmButtonColor: '#00c6ff',
                background: '#1e2a38', color: '#fff',
                width: 400, padding: 0,
                willClose: () => { updateDoc(roomRef, { "gameState.modal": null }); }
            });
            
            await updateDoc(roomRef, { "gameState.grid": newGrid, "gameState.modal": itemData });
        }

        window.showInstructions = () => {
            Swal.fire({
                imageUrl: 'images/instructions.png',
                imageAlt: 'شرح اللعبة',
                showConfirmButton: false, showCloseButton: true,
                background: 'transparent',
                backdrop: `rgba(0,0,0,0.9)`,
                customClass: { popup: 'swal-transparent-popup' },
                padding: 0, width: 'auto', imageWidth: 'auto', imageHeight: '80vh'
            });
        };

        window.copyLink = () => {
            const link = window.location.href.replace('the-cell-control', 'the-cell-view');
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(link).then(() => {
                const Toast = Swal.mixin({toast: true, position: 'top', showConfirmButton: false, timer: 1500, background: '#1e2a38', color:'#fff'});
                Toast.fire({ icon: 'success', title: 'تم نسخ الرابط' });
            });
        };

        window.endGame = async () => {
            Swal.fire({
                title: 'إنهاء اللعبة؟', text: "سيتم حذف الغرفة نهائياً", icon: 'warning',
                showCancelButton: true, confirmButtonText: 'نعم، إنهاء', cancelButtonText: 'تراجع',
                background: '#1e2a38', color: '#fff', confirmButtonColor: '#e74c3c'
            }).then(async (res) => {
                if(res.isConfirmed) { await deleteDoc(roomRef); window.location.href = 'index.html'; }
            });
        };
    </script>

</body></html>
data.title: تحكم الزنزانة | KIO
